name: Bamboo Investment API
description: REST API providing access to investment profiles, brokerage account management, portfolio tracking, stock search, money movement (deposits and withdrawals), and fractional stock trading on US and Nigerian capital markets.

entryPoints.name: Generate Access Token
entryPoints.description:
This endpoint generates your access token, referred to as your `x-client-token` within Bamboo’s system. 
The credentials needed to generate it will be provided by the Bamboo Team during account setup.

entryPoints.description:

entryPoints.name: Create New User
entryPoints.description:

entryPoints.name: NGX Dictionary
entryPoints.description: This endpoint provides the acceptable data for fetching the format for the states and LGAs required during account creation. This info is needed to enable users trade in the NG market.

entryPoints.name: Fetch User Portfolio
entryPoints.description: This endpoint returns the information of a user's equity value, cash available for investing, and the user's stock position in the  Nigerian Market.

entryPoints.name: Fetch User Cash Balance
entryPoints.description: This endpoint returns data about the user's cash balance.

entryPoints.name: Fetch Deposits by Reference
entryPoints.description: This is used to fetch a deposit by its specific transaction reference number.

entryPoints.description: This endpoint is used to withdraw from users' cash balances.

entryPoints.description: This is used to fetch a withdrawal by its specific transaction reference number.

entryPoints.description: This endpoint fetches the list of stocks with basic information about them like their symbol and logo.

entryPoints.name: Place An Order on the NGX Market
entryPoints.description: If the user is eligible to make trades, this endpoint is used to place an order using the result of the calculated order  endpoint. Please note: Tenants are to place just MARKET order type.

entryPoints.name: Fetch Order Details by ID
entryPoints.description: This endpoint is used to fetch the details of an order.

entryPoints.name: Fetch Order Status by ID
entryPoints.description: This endpoint is used to fetch the status of an order.

entryPoints.name: Fetch Pending Orders
entryPoints.description: This endpoint is used to fetch a list of pending orders.

entryPoints.name: Cancel An Order on the NGX
entryPoints.description: This endpoint is used to cancel an order. Kindly note that only pending orders can be cancelled.
